info.title: Rulxy Platform API
info.description: Internal API documentation for the Rulxy platform. Covers project management, code generation, builds, proxy services, billing, and admin endpoints.

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-RUX-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: RUX API key for proxy services

tags.name: Proxy Services
tags.description: Managed backend services for generated apps

get.description: Checks the health of the application, including database connection.
Retrieves a specific project by ID, ensuring the authenticated user owns it.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the project to retrieve

patch.description: Updates an existing project by ID with provided fields. Only the owner can update their project.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the project to update

delete.description: Deletes a project by ID, ensuring the authenticated user owns it.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the project to delete

get.summary: Get domain settings for a project
get.description: Retrieves the subdomain and custom domain settings for a web project.

patch.summary: Update domain settings for a project
patch.description: Updates the subdomain or custom domain for a web project.

delete.summary: Remove domain settings from a project
delete.description: Clears subdomain and/or custom domain from a project.

post.description: Checks if the custom domain has correct DNS records configured.

post.summary: Submit a project for EAS build
post.description: Builds a project using Expo Application Services (EAS), requiring authentication and a project ID. Submits a ZIP archive of the project files to EAS for building.

projectId.description: ID of the project to build

500.description: Build failed or EAS not configured

get.description: Retrieves the status of an EAS build by build ID, requiring authentication. Returns build details including phase, URL, and error if any.

parameters.name: buildId
parameters.description: ID of the build to check

500.description: Failed to get build status or EAS not configured

post.description: Builds an iOS app using Expo Application Services (EAS). Signing is handled by the platform's managed credentials. Users only need sufficient credits.

projectId.description: ID of the project to build

post.description: Builds an Android app using Expo Application Services (EAS). Signing is handled by the platform's managed credentials. Users only need sufficient credits.

projectId.description: ID of the project to build

get.description: Downloads a complete project as a ZIP file, including all code files, configurations, and additional files like README and .gitignore. Requires authentication and ownership of the project.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: ID of the project to export

post.description: Verifies and stores an encrypted GitHub access token for the authenticated user. The token is validated and user information is retrieved from GitHub.

get.description: Returns whether the authenticated user has a connected GitHub account.

delete.description: Removes the stored GitHub access token for the authenticated user, disconnecting their GitHub account.

post.summary: Create GitHub repository and push project code
post.description: Creates a new GitHub repository for the authenticated user, pushes the project's code files to it, and updates the project record with GitHub information. Requires GitHub integration plan and connected GitHub account.

projectId.description: ID of the project to create repo for

200.description: Repository created and code pushed successfully

400.description: Validation error or GitHub not connected

403.description: Plan does not allow GitHub integration

post.summary: Push project code to GitHub repository
post.description: Pushes the latest project code to an existing connected GitHub repository. Requires GitHub integration plan, connected GitHub account, and a repository linked to the project.

projectId.description: ID of the project to push

400.description: Validation error, GitHub not connected, or project not linked to repo

403.description: Plan does not allow GitHub integration

post.description: Saves encrypted Google Play service account credentials for EAS builds. Requires authentication and a Pro or Elite plan. Overwrites existing credentials with the same name.

serviceAccountJson.description: Google service account JSON as string

get.description: Retrieves the list of connected Google Play credentials for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Deletes a specific Google Play credential by ID. Requires the credential to belong to the authenticated user.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the credential to delete

post.summary: Connect App Store Connect API Key
post.description: Saves encrypted App Store Connect API Key credentials for publishing builds to the App Store. Overwrites existing credentials with the same name.

get.description: Retrieves the list of connected Apple Developer credentials for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Deletes a specific Apple Developer credential by ID. Requires the credential to belong to the authenticated user.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the credential to delete

post.description: Creates a Stripe billing portal session for the authenticated user to manage their subscription and view token purchase history.

url.description: URL to the Stripe billing portal

500.description: Failed to create billing portal session

post.description: Creates a Stripe checkout session for one-time token purchase. Works independently from subscription plans.

url.description: URL to the Stripe checkout page

post.summary: Handle Stripe webhook events for token purchases
post.description: Handles Stripe webhook events for one-time token purchases and subscription billing.

get.description: Public endpoint returning paginated published blog posts.

get.summary: Get a published blog post by slug
get.description: Public endpoint returning a single published blog post.
Returns a paginated list of all users with their details.

patch.description: Update a user's plan, role, or credits.

get.description: Returns platform statistics for admins including user counts, credit usage, and project counts.

post.description: Enables or disables maintenance mode for the platform. Only admins can access this endpoint.

get.description: Returns the current maintenance mode status. Only admins can access this endpoint.

post.description:
Store any data in collections. Perfect for bookings, todos, products, or any other data your generated app needs.

**Authentication:** Requires a valid RUX API key.

**Rate Limits:** 100 operations per minute per project.

**Credits:** 1 credit per operation.

Data is automatically scoped to your project.

Complete user authentication system for generated apps. Supports signup, login, logout, profile management, and password reset.

**Authentication:** Requires a valid RUX API key.

**Rate Limits:** 60 auth operations per minute per project.

**Credits:** 1 credit per operation.

Users are automatically scoped to your project.

401.description: Invalid or missing API key / Invalid credentials

post.description:
Proxied access to email sending via SendGrid. Generated apps can send emails without needing their own SendGrid API key.

**Authentication:** Requires a valid RUX API key.

**Rate Limits:** 30 emails per minute per project.

**Credits:** 2 credits per email sent.

Proxied access to SMS sending via Twilio. Generated apps can send SMS messages without needing their own Twilio account.

**Authentication:** Requires a valid RUX API key.

**Rate Limits:** 20 SMS per minute per project.

**Credits:** 5 credits per SMS sent.

to.description: Recipient phone number in E.164 format

from.description: Sender phone number (defaults to platform number)

post.description:
Proxied access to Google Maps APIs including Geocoding, Directions, and Places.

**Authentication:** Requires a valid RUX API key.

**Rate Limits:** 100 requests per minute per project.

**Credits:** 1 credit per request.

200.description: Successful response from Google Maps API

post.description:
Get a presigned URL for uploading files to the platform's storage.

**Authentication:** Requires a valid RUX API key.

**Rate Limits:** 100 requests per minute per project.

**File Size Limits:** Max 50MB per file.

**Storage Limits:** Based on plan (FREE: 100MB, PRO: 1GB, ELITE: 10GB).

isPublic.description: Whether the file should be publicly accessible

get.description:
List files stored for the project.

**Authentication:** Requires a valid RUX API key.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of files to return

delete.description:
Delete a file from storage.

**Authentication:** Requires a valid RUX API key.

fileId.description: ID of the file to delete

post.summary: xAI Grok Chat Completions Proxy (Default AI)
post.description:
Proxied access to xAI's Grok chat completions API. This is the primary AI service for Rulxy apps.

**Authentication:** Requires a valid RUX API key.

**Rate Limits:** 60 requests per minute per project.

**Credits:** 8 credits per 1K tokens.
